metadata.description: haxlys's curated agent skills marketplace. Vendored copies from MIT/Apache-licensed upstream repos + references to trusted skill packs.

plugins.name: web-design-reviewer
plugins.description: Visual inspection of websites to identify and fix design issues. Vendored from github/awesome-copilot (MIT).

plugins.name: web-component-design
plugins.description: Master React, Vue, and Svelte component patterns. Vendored from wshobson/agents (MIT).

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0).

plugins.name: electron
plugins.description: Automate Electron desktop apps via agent-browser. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0).

plugins.name: slack
plugins.description: Interact with Slack workspaces using browser automation. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0).

plugins.name: vercel-sandbox
plugins.description: Run agent-browser inside Vercel Sandbox microVMs. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0).

plugins.name: agentcore
plugins.description: Run agent-browser on AWS Bedrock AgentCore cloud browsers. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0).

plugins.name: dogfood
plugins.description: Systematically explore and test a web app to find bugs and UX issues. Vendored from vercel-labs/agent-browser (Apache-2.0).

plugins.name: superpowers
plugins.description: obra/superpowers — TDD, debugging, planning, code review, worktree workflows. Referenced upstream (always latest).
